caption: A man wearing a grey, pointed wig, glasses, headphones, a white long-sleeved shirt, a red bow tie, and white suspenders speaks in a studio setting. He is positioned behind a professional microphone. The background consists of walls decorated with numerous framed photographs and clothing racks displaying apparel. Two logos appear on the screen: a circular emblem with the text "PODCAST" and a rectangular logo that reads "BOSS TALK JOY". As the sequence progresses, the man gestures with his hands while talking, shifting his gaze slightly. He remains the central focus of the scene, with the camera maintaining a medium shot of his upper body. The lighting is bright and consistent, highlighting the textures of his clothing and the detailed items in the surrounding room.
